Pan Lin жҪҳиҮЁ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Lin (жҪҳиҮЁ)was born in Kuaiji. Scourge of the area, kept evading capture until Lu Xun led an army against him.
